creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Created attachment 205765
license file + Makefile change

I think the license needs an update.
More details in https://www.mongodb.com/community/licensing.
Mongo still distributes the AGPL license text in the distfile, so I included a copy-paste of the SSPL text from the website in the files/ directory.
Complete license: https://www.mongodb.com/licensing/server-side-public-license

I used the same permissions as the AGPL in the LICENSE_SSPL_PERM line. I'm quite sure the SSPL gives the same permissions as the AGPL with regard to distributing distfiles and packages.

NB: it's the first time I do something with the LICENSE* framework of ports, so please tell (or modify) if I missed something.
